title: Supply Chain Manager - Allcargo Logistics - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Allcargo Logistics - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!
